name: Domain Search & Registration
description: Find and register your perfect .com, .net, or hundreds of other domain extensions. Establish your unique address on the web.

name: Website Builder
description: Build a professional website in minutes with drag-and-drop tools. No coding required. Mobile-friendly and SEO-ready.

name: Managed WordPress
description: Fully managed WordPress hosting with automatic updates, daily backups, and one-click staging. Ideal for content-heavy sites and blogs.

name: Professional Email (Workspace Email)
description: Get a professional email address like you@yourbusiness.com. Looks credible to clients and keeps business separate from personal email.

name: Microsoft 365
description: Full Microsoft 365 suite — Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams — with a custom business email. Great for teams needing collaboration tools.

name: Online Store (WooCommerce / GoDaddy Payments)
description: Launch an online store to sell physical or digital products. Includes payment processing, inventory management, and shipping tools.

name: SSL Certificate
description: Encrypt your website traffic and show the padlock in browsers. Required for customer trust and Google SEO ranking.

name: Website Security (SiteLock)
description: Daily malware scanning, automatic removal, and a security trust seal. Protects your site and reassures visitors.

name: Websites + Marketing
description: All-in-one platform combining a website, SEO tools, social media posting, email campaigns, and online listings in one dashboard.

name: Web Hosting
description: Reliable shared, VPS, or dedicated hosting for your website. Fast load times, 99.9% uptime, and 24/7 support.
